description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named s3fs-fuse CI that runs on every push, pull request, and on a weekly schedule. The workflow has three jobs: Linux, macos12, and MemoryTest. The Linux job runs on multiple Linux containers, checks out the code, installs packages, builds, and runs tests. The macos12 job runs on macOS 12, checks out the code, installs fuse-t, and runs tests. The MemoryTest job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the code, installs packages, and runs memory-related tests.
